title: Kyano Digital joins Cryptool as development partner
content_html:
Cryptool has brought in Kyano Digital as a development partner for the next stage of the platform.

Kyano Digital is a full-stack studio with a track record in modern product design, smart contract development and security-first engineering. They will work directly alongside the in-house Cryptool team on API integrations, database architecture and the security model.

The added capacity matters now. With the first modules of Cryptool weeks away from public testing, Kyano Digital lets the team move faster without trading off quality.
author: Cryptool
